name: Nordic Flanges Group AB (publ)
summary: Nordic Flanges Group AB (publ) manufactures and sells industrial flanges in Nordic countries. It offers stainless steel, carbon steel, special alloy, titanium, and aluminum products that include flanges, welding necks, welding rings, and loose flanges, as well as special flanges and customized products. The company was formerly known as Vinovo AB (publ) and changed its name to Nordic Flanges Group AB (publ) in March 2015. Nordic Flanges Group AB (publ) was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
